<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

This project is a Django REST API backend for scalable task management (TaskFlow API) using clean architecture. Use Django, DRF, PostgreSQL, Pytest, Factory Boy, Coverage.py, pre-commit hooks, Docker, and drf-yasg for Swagger documentation. Follow the domain/services/api/tests folder structure for code organization.
